settings.name: sync
settings.label: Sync products
settings.help: Loads the Shopify frontpage collection, creates missing CMS products, and fully refreshes products that changed on Shopify. When nothing is new or stale, fully refreshes one product with the oldest Shopify check (shopify_checked_at). Stops after about 50 seconds — click Sync again to continue.

settings.name: purge
settings.label: Purge products
settings.help: Deletes local products missing on Shopify, and older local duplicates of the same Shopify ID (keeps the newest panel). Related images removed. Oldest first. Stops after about 50 seconds — click Purge again to continue.

settings.name: purge_images
settings.label: Purge images
settings.help: Moves unused Shopify-scraped images (and their resized copies) to cache/tmp/img/, preserving paths. Stops after about 100 seconds — click again to continue.

settings.name: reload_data
settings.label: Reload Shopify data
settings.help: Marks every local product for a full Shopify refresh (sync_needed). Does not call Shopify immediately — run Sync to process the queue. Products not yet refreshed keep serving cached CMS / thumbnail HTML.

settings.name: thumb_html_ttl
settings.label: Thumb HTML cache (seconds)
settings.help: How long product thumbnail HTML/payload may be reused without rebuild (default 900 = 15 minutes)

settings.name: shopify_data_ttl
settings.label: Shopify data recheck (seconds)
settings.help: How long CMS product data is treated as fresh without a full Shopify Admin recheck (default 3600 = 1 hour)

settings.name: product_page_recheck_ttl
settings.label: Product page recheck (seconds)
settings.help: How often a product page may recheck Shopify for price/availability (default 300 = 5 minutes)

settings.name: max_refresh_time
settings.label: Max refresh time per request (seconds)
settings.help: Budget for Shopify Admin API product refreshes in one page request (default 30). When exhausted, serve CMS data without more live API calls

settings.name: collection_subcategory_suffix
settings.label: Subcategory suffix
settings.help: Shopify titles ending with this become shop/subcategory (Shop by range). Parent shop/category is set manually (or fallback). Example: suffix "range" → "Sugar & Sass Range" → subcategory Sugar & Sass. Matching is case-insensitive; suffix is stripped from the heading.

settings.name: collection_collection_suffixes
settings.label: Collection suffixes
settings.help: Shopify titles ending with any of these become shop/collection (multi-membership on the product). Example: suffix "category" → "Birthday Category" → collection Birthday. Add one row per client naming pattern.
